title: rhaphiolepis tengyuehensis
intro: Rhaphiolepis tengyuehensis, also known as the Chinese Rhaphiolepis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Rhaphiolepis tengyuehensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
